steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “just as fascinating and engaging as exploring in person” explains concretely why research is “its own reward.” The transition must signal this is supporting evidence for the initial claim.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”In fact” signals that what follows is the evidence or elaboration supporting the preceding claim—it means “actually, here's how.” The other three don't signal this evidence relationship: by contrast implies opposition, likewise treats them as parallel claims, and besides merely adds information.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
